description: Webhook.site is a service for generating temporary or managed webhook, email, and DNS endpoints so you can inspect, test, and automate incoming requests. It also provides account features for managing tokens, request history, teams, groups, and related automation.
summary: webhook.site exposes a public HTTP API at https://webhook.site, a WebSocket listener endpoint at https://ws.webhook.site, public inbound capture URLs under https://webhook.site/{tokenId}, and a `whcli` CLI.
